---
name: Errata
about: Report a factual error, typo, or incorrect result in the paper
title: "[Errata] "
labels: errata
assignees: davidorban
---

**Location in paper** (section, equation, figure, or page number in the preprint):

**Error description** (what the text currently says):

**Correct version** (what it should say, with supporting evidence or calculation):

**Severity**
- [ ] Typographical / cosmetic
- [ ] Incorrect value or formula (does not change conclusions)
- [ ] Incorrect value or formula (affects a conclusion or hypothesis)
- [ ] Critical error (invalidates a key result)

**Additional context** (references, derivation, or links):
